title: cert_add_trusted label: &[u8] instead of impl AsRef<[u8]>
description: cert_add_trusted takes label: &[u8] while every other method that accepts a label (key_cache, nvm_add, nvm_overwrite) uses label: impl AsRef<[u8]>. This forces callers to write b"my-label" or .as_bytes() while adjacent methods accept &str directly. Fix: change cert_add_trusted signature to label: impl AsRef<[u8]> and add let label = label.as_ref(); at top of body, matching the pattern in key.rs and nvm.rs.
